description: Block is the art of parrying or deflecting blows with a shield.
Armorer is the art of maintaining and repairing armor and weapons.
Medium Armor is the skill of using medium armor effectively.
Heavy Armor is the skill of using heavy armor effectively.
Blunt Weapon covers all one and two-handed blunt weapons.
Long Blade covers all one and two-handed long blade weapons.
Axe covers all one and two-handed axe weapons.
Spear covers spear and polearm weapons.
Athletics governs how fast you move and how quickly you recover from fatigue.
Enchant is the art of using and creating magic items.
Destruction is the school of magic governing spells that damage, weaken, or destroy.
Alteration is the school of magic governing manipulation of the physical world.
Illusion is the school of magic governing light, darkness, and the mind.
Conjuration is the school of magic governing summoning creatures and bound equipment.
Mysticism is the school of magic governing arcane forces and the spirit.
Restoration is the school of magic governing healing and protection.
Alchemy is the art of creating potions from ingredients.
Unarmored is the skill of fighting without armor.
Security is the art of opening locks and disarming traps.
Sneak is the art of moving unseen and unheard.
Acrobatics is the art of jumping, falling, and moving in unusual ways.
Light Armor is the skill of using light armor effectively.
Short Blade covers daggers, tanto, wakizashi, and short swords.
Mercantile is the art of trade and commerce.
Speechcraft is the art of persuasion.
Hand-to-Hand is the art of fighting without weapons.
Breathe water as though it were air.
Walk on water as if it were land.
Reduces the weight of carried items.
Opens a locked door or container.
Permanently reduces an attribute until restored.
Permanently reduces a skill until restored.
Target takes increased common disease damage.
Target takes increased blight disease damage.
Target is vulnerable to Corprus disease.
Target is more vulnerable to physical weapons.
Damages and destroys a weapon over time.
Damages and destroys armor over time.
Renders the target unable to move.
Prevents the target from casting spells.
Creates a noise that disrupts opponents.
Causes a humanoid to fight better.
Causes a creature to fight better.
Traps a soul in a soul gem upon death.
Allows you to move objects at a distance.
Marks your current location for Recall.
Teleports you to your Mark location.
Teleports you to the nearest Temple.
Teleports you to the nearest Shrine.
Increases the rate of Magicka regeneration.
Absorbs an attribute from the target.
Absorbs a skill from the target.
Summons a Scamp to fight for you.
Summons a Clannfear to fight for you.
Summons a Daedroth to fight for you.
Summons a Dremora to fight for you.
Summons an Ancestor Ghost to fight for you.
Summons a Skeletal Minion to fight for you.
Summons a Bonewalker to fight for you.
Summons a Greater Bonewalker to fight for you.
Summons a Bonelord to fight for you.
Summons a Winged Twilight to fight for you.
Summons a Hunger to fight for you.
Summons a Golden Saint to fight for you.
Summons a Flame Atronach to fight for you.
Summons a Frost Atronach to fight for you.
Summons a Storm Atronach to fight for you.
Summons a Centurion Sphere to fight for you.
Deals sun damage to the target.
Summons a Fabricant to fight for you.
Summons a Wolf to fight for you.
Summons a Bear to fight for you.
Summons a Bonewolf to fight for you.
